- claim.id must be a non-empty string
- claim.type must be one of: causal_mechanism_claim, claim_transition, evidence_conflict_claim, exact_model_solution, financial_metric_claim, multimodal_evidence_claim, physical_accuracy, reproducibility_check, statistical_confidence, systematic_review_claim, universal_anchor_claim
